name: @v5x/serial
description: implementation of the v5 serial protocol

scripts.build: bun run clean && bun run build:dts && bun run build:esm && bun run build:cjs
scripts.build:esm: bun build ./src/index.ts --target browser --format esm --sourcemap=linked --outdir ./dist --entry-naming=index.js --external unzipit --external neverthrow && bun build ./src/VexPacketCore.ts --target browser --format esm --sourcemap=linked --outdir ./dist --entry-naming=packet-core.js
scripts.build:cjs: bun build ./src/index.ts --target node --format cjs --sourcemap=linked --outdir ./dist --entry-naming=index.cjs --external unzipit --external neverthrow && bun build ./src/VexPacketCore.ts --target node --format cjs --sourcemap=linked --outdir ./dist --entry-naming=packet-core.cjs

author: qainguin <slimaster14@gmail.com>
